main.description: Manually reassign a report to a different queue (or unassign it). Records a queueActivity entry on the report.

reportId.description: ID of the report to reassign

queueId.description: Target queue ID. Use -1 to unassign from any queue.

comment.description: Optional moderator-only note recorded on the resulting queueActivity as internalNote.

errors.name: ReportNotFound
errors.description: No report exists with the given reportId

errors.name: ReportClosed
errors.description: The report is closed and cannot be reassigned

errors.name: AlreadyInTargetQueue
errors.description: The report is already assigned to the target queue

errors.name: QueueNotFound
errors.description: No active queue exists with the given queueId

errors.name: QueueDisabled
errors.description: The target queue is disabled and cannot receive new assignments
